Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class MessagingSession

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.MessagingSession
public class MessagingSession extends SObject

Java class for MessagingSession complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="MessagingSession">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AcceptTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AgentMessageCount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AgentType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AttachedContentDocuments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Case" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Case" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CaseId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Cases" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChannelEndUserFormula" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChannelGroup" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChannelIntent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChannelKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChannelLocale" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChannelName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChannelType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CombinedAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentDocumentLinks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Conversation" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Conversation" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConversationEntries" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConversationId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EndTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EndUserAccount" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Account" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EndUserAccountId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EndUserContact" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Contact" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EndUserContactId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EndUserMessageCount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FeedSubscriptionsForEntity" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Feeds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Histories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastReferencedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastViewedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Lead" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Lead" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LeadId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessagingChannel" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}MessagingChannel" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessagingChannelId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessagingEndUser" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}MessagingEndUser" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MessagingEndUserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Opportunity" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Opportunity" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OpportunityId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Origin" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Owner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PreviewDetails" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessInstances" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessSteps" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordActionHistories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordActions" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SessionKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Shares" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StartTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetUser" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetUserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
